view.title: Validate explicit UC need #3
view.subtitle: Step failed: Exploratory validation failed: The requirement for multiple time slots per day is not satisfied based on the current evidence.

blocks.title: Uc Need Validate 3 failed
blocks.message: Step failed: Exploratory validation failed: The requirement for multiple time slots per day is not satisfied based on the current evidence.

items.label: Error
items.value: Exploratory validation failed: The requirement for multiple time slots per day is not satisfied based on the current evidence.

items.label: Assessment
items.value: The exploratory step aimed to validate the requirement of having multiple time slots per day for the tour. However, the evidence provided only confirms two specific time slots (10am and 2pm) without any indication of additional slots or flexibility in scheduling. The prior steps indicate that only two bookings were confirmed, which does not demonstrate the ability to accommodate multiple time slots effectively, leading to a gap in the requirement coverage.

gaps: The evidence does not confirm the existence of multiple time slots beyond the stated 10am and 2pm.
